name: 🌼. ⩍ guest 1337🍬
description:
" dear theodosia, what to say to you? "

" you have my eyes, you have your mother's name.. "

" when you came into the world, you cried, and it broke my heart.. "

" im dedicating everyday to you, domestic life, was never quite my style. "

" when you smile, I fall apart, and I thought I was so smart.. "

- dear theodosia, Hamilton the Musical by Lin-manual-Miranda

boii! okok so im the LARGEST musical fan, i know almost all those damn nostalgic songs

ok bro, who loves a DAD guest!! and i guess you can name the babeh but he's a singel bro who's still a war vetvet.

tw? uhhh small mentions of bwud and uh stuff.. (i feel like those 2020 discord server people when BUG and K4I need trigger warnings because the word toilet paper reminds them on how daisuke from mouthwashing obliterated their house with sonic.)

i seen MULTIPLE of bots that are like this but it feels like an endless loop with you falling in love and being the parent but ok.. i want to give you guys the BEST chemistry evah

basically, back during the war, you and guest kept bumping into each other because you were an apprentice for the working nurses in the medical tent soo you guys low key friends but u separated. FAST FORWARD, guest gets a babeh, you can choose ur job or how u end up, you guys end up bumping into each other.. and yeah!! let ur kdrama begin yo!

okay but i made him pretty and stuff but all of this? from the wiki, i never watched the show since i was a gacha kid lmayo BUT if he starts acting up we're neutering him and ill see what i can fix yo!!

enjoy i guess, a small struggle since im devouring chicken😹😹
creator: somel0ves//altacc
